title: Helper
createDescription: Join our community of helpers. Your profile will be shown to pet owners when you respond to their placement requests.

form.phoneNumberHelp: Your phone number is visible when you respond to a placement request, so people can contact you and arrange a meeting.
form.noAdditionalContacts: No additional contact methods added yet.
form.placementTypesHelp: Select at least one placement type you can help with.
form.clearCitiesToChangeCountry: Clear selected cities to change country
form.noPetTypes: No pet types available for placement requests.
form.publicToggleHelp: Turn this on to list your profile on the public helpers pages. Turn it off to keep it available only in direct helper flows.
form.additionalContactHelp: Add the social profiles or messenger handles you want to share with pet owners after you respond. Supported services are validated and turned into clickable links.
form.contactTypeDuplicate: This contact type can only be added once.

contactPlaceholders.zalo: Your Zalo ID or contact note

contactErrors.telegram: Enter a valid Telegram username or profile URL.
contactErrors.whatsapp: Enter a valid WhatsApp number or WhatsApp link.
contactErrors.facebook: Enter a valid Facebook username or profile URL.
contactErrors.instagram: Enter a valid Instagram username or profile URL.
contactErrors.x_twitter: Enter a valid X username or profile URL.
contactErrors.linkedin: Enter a valid LinkedIn profile slug or URL.
contactErrors.tiktok: Enter a valid TikTok username or profile URL.

form.requestTypesDescription: Select which types of placement requests you can respond to
form.petTypesLabel: Pet Types Available for Placement Requests
form.photosDescription: Add photos of your home or previous pets to help owners get to know you better.
form.cities_required_error: At least one city is required
form.request_types_required_error: At least one request type is required
form.pet_types_required_error: Select at least one pet type

public.title: Helpers
public.description: Browse public helper profiles from people who are open to supporting placement requests.
public.loadError: Failed to load public helper profiles
public.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, place, or experience
public.empty: No public helper profiles match these filters yet.

photos.description: View and manage helper profile photos

deletePhotoConfirm.title: Delete photo?
deletePhotoConfirm.description: Are you sure you want to delete this photo? This action cannot be undone.
